examples.title: Simple Rule-Based Reasoning System
examples.description: A basic expert system demonstrating knowledge representation and reasoning
examples.explanation: This demonstrates the fundamental AI concept of knowledge representation (facts in knowledge_base) and reasoning (rule evaluation). The system uses IF-THEN rules to derive conclusions from given symptoms.
examples.timeComplexity: O(r * c) where r = number of rules, c = conditions per rule
examples.spaceComplexity: O(n + r) where n = facts, r = rules

examples.title: Simple Learning Agent
examples.description: Basic learning mechanism that improves decisions based on feedback
examples.explanation: This demonstrates AI learning capability. The agent maintains value estimates for actions and updates them based on rewards received, gradually learning which action is better.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) for action selection, O(1) for learning update
examples.spaceComplexity: O(n) where n = number of actions

examples.title: Simple Pattern Recognition
examples.description: Basic perceptron demonstrating AI perception/pattern recognition
examples.explanation: This perceptron demonstrates AI perception capability - recognizing patterns in input data. It learns to identify the AND logical function through training, showing how AI can learn to perceive patterns.
